name: frontend-skills
description: React/TypeScript frontend + Go backend enforcement harness. 92 wired hooks across 101 scripts enforce patterns on every edit. Green != done: `test-warning-check` surfaces warnings on passing test/lint/type runs (DeprecationWarning, React `act()`, unhandled rejection, `@ts-ignore`); `ci-warning-audit` Stop-hook scans `gh run view --log` on green CI for deprecations / console warnings / skipped tests. 51 skills from TDD through CI-green PR, including /steelman anti-sycophancy guard + /snyk-ux-security per-path vuln sweep (JS + Go ecosystems; exploitability-triage first gate via `bun why`/`go mod why`/`govulncheck`; top-level direct dep bump first, parent dep bump second, resolutions/overrides/replace as last resort only with follow-up TODO to remove; React 18 pin + changelog-walked major bumps + no-deferral escalation; Go `snyk test --file=go.mod` + `go get -u` + `go mod tidy` + `govulncheck` verify). Session exit blocked while PR review threads remain unresolved. TypeScript escape hatches blocked at Edit. tsconfig strictness weakening blocked. Worktree isolation + branch safety hook-enforced. bun.lock + yarn.lock parity enforced (Snyk IO doesn't parse bun.lock). 21 LLM failure modes enforced: 7 Karpathy single-agent + 14 MAST multi-agent (Cemri et al. NeurIPS 2025). OWASP + STRIDE subset + snyk/bun audit. Core Web Vitals perf gate. MCP ban with CLI redirect (~20x token savings). Agent-browser wrap (~91% token reduction for AI browsing). 3-hat plan review (product/engineering/design). 9 agents (adds plan hats + karpathy reference), 5 routines. Opus 4.7 tuned, POSIX-friendly.

x-changelog.4.10.2: 2026-05-06 -- Codex hook parity pass: map Claude PostToolUseFailure into Codex PostToolUse, add a Codex PermissionRequest adapter that reuses approval-safe Bash/MCP deny guardrails, and regenerate Codex hooks so the plugin uses every supported Codex lifecycle event with an equivalent harness behavior.
x-changelog.4.10.1: 2026-05-06 -- Codex marketplace packaging fix: point Codex plugin hooks at a Codex-supported lifecycle file, regenerate .codex/hooks.json from the manifest, refresh stale install-surface copy (92 hooks / 100 scripts / 51 skills / 9 agents / 5 routines), and bump marketplace metadata for upgrade detection.
x-changelog.4.10.0: 2026-04-29 -- Sync mattpocock/skills (Apr 17 -> Apr 29). New `/diagnose` skill ported verbatim: feedback-loop-first 6-phase debug discipline (build loop -> reproduce -> 3-5 ranked falsifiable hypotheses -> instrument with `[DEBUG-prefix]` cleanup grep -> fix at correct seam + regression test -> cleanup + post-mortem hand-off to `/improve-codebase-architecture`). 10 ranked feedback-loop strategies in Phase 1 (failing test, curl/HTTP, CLI fixture diff, headless browser, replay, throwaway harness, property/fuzz, `git bisect run`, differential, HITL). `scripts/hitl-loop.template.sh` for human-in-the-loop bug repro. Merged `github-triage` + `triage-issue` into single `/triage` with multi-tracker support: `tracker-github.md` uses `gh issue`, `tracker-jira.md` uses `acli jira workitem`. Bug-investigation + TDD-fix-plan flow absorbed as sub-mode in `triage/REFERENCE.md`. Five canonical state roles (`needs-triage`, `needs-info`, `ready-for-agent`, `ready-for-human`, `wontfix`) map to project-specific labels/statuses; AI disclaimer required on every triage comment. Vague-prose domain-glossary + ADR awareness added to `/tdd`, `/improve-codebase-architecture`, `/zoom-out`, `/triage` -- soft-dependency style: skills degrade gracefully when no `CONTEXT.md` exists. Upstream content merged while preserving our 3-hat fan-out (product/engineering/design): `improve-codebase-architecture/LANGUAGE.md` adds canonical vocabulary (module/interface/seam/adapter/depth/leverage/locality + deletion test + interface-is-test-surface + one-vs-two-adapters rule); `tdd/tests.md` adds good vs bad test philosophy (integration-style behaviour through public interface, never implementation details); `domain-model/ADR-FORMAT.md` 'what qualifies' enriched with boundary decisions, invisible constraints, non-obvious rejections. Skills 48 -> 51 (added /diagnose, registered /domain-model + /zoom-out which existed on disk but weren't in plugin.json, removed /triage-issue, added /triage). +96 eval checks across 3 new evals: `test-triage.sh` (32), `test-diagnose.sh` (29), `test-domain-model-merge.sh` (35); `test-tdd.sh` patched to assert `tests.md` link. Skipped per direction: caveman, git-guardrails, to-prd/to-issues, /setup-matt-pocock-skills explicit pointer (vague prose only). `domain-model` not renamed to upstream's `grill-with-docs` -- high blast radius (Phase 2b lifecycle gate name) + current name more semantic.
x-changelog.4.9.0: 2026-04-23 -- Green != done warnings gate. Two new hooks (89 -> 92 wired, 98 -> 100 scripts). (1) `test-warning-check.sh` (PostToolUse Bash): on exit=0 from `vitest` / `bun test` / `playwright` / `tsgo` / `tsc` / `biome` / `lint`, scans stdout + stderr for curated warning patterns -- Node `DeprecationWarning`, `ExperimentalWarning`, `(node:...) XxxWarning`, React `Warning: An update to .* inside a test was not wrapped in act`, `Warning: Each child in a list should have a unique "key"`, `Warning: validateDOMNesting`, `Warning: Failed prop type`, `Warning: Cannot update a component .* while rendering`, `Warning: Received .* for a non-boolean attribute`, `MaxListenersExceededWarning` / `PossibleEventEmitterMemoryLeak`, `UnhandledPromiseRejection` / `Unhandled Rejection` / `Unhandled Errors`, vitest `stderr |` during test, `Tests skipped N`, `@ts-expect-error`, `@ts-ignore`, `npm WARN deprecated`. Emits systemMessage nudge with file:line sample. Per-test-file escape `// allow: test-warning`; env `TEST_WARNINGS_ALLOW=1` globally. 3x same-kind streak escalates via warning-streak tracker. (2) `ci-warning-audit.sh` (Stop hook): gated on feature branch + session touched code + PR exists + all CI checks SUCCESS (pending/failing defers to lifecycle-stop). Resolves PR head SHA, fetches `gh run view <id> --log` with 45s timeout, pipes through grep on the same curated pattern, heads 30. Per-SHA cache in session dir so repeat Stops don't re-fetch the same log. `hook_warn` (non-blocking) with file:line sample + suggested full-log command. Disable via `CI_WARNING_AUDIT=0`. (3) CLAUDE.md Tests section + tdd/SKILL.md `When Done` checklist updated: zero warnings in local output AND CI, with escape hatch documented. Why: passing tests can silently spew deprecations, log errors, leak unhandled rejections -- noise that rots into real bugs when the lib actually removes the API. 'Green' was never the bar; zero warnings is.
x-changelog.4.8.0: 2026-04-22 -- /steelman anti-sycophancy skill (opt-in only). New skill at steelman/SKILL.md argues strongest opposite case with repo evidence on user assertions -- factual/causal/architectural claim types only (preference/goal/scope declined). Procedure: identify claim -> fan-out evidence gather (grep, read, run) -> write counter-argument with file:line refs -> verdict (confirmed | contradicted | mixed). User-invoked via `/steelman` slash only. **No ambient CLAUDE.md rule, no automatic hook fire, no telemetry log script** -- plugin consumers see zero behavior change unless they type `/steelman`. Ambient premise-check directive + jsonl telemetry were considered and held back pending real-world feedback on the opt-in surface; re-evaluate once /steelman fire-rate data exists from dogfooding. Why: LLM sycophancy risk when the user asserts something wrong and the model agrees by default -- /steelman forces the strongest counter-case with repo evidence before proceeding. Skills 47 -> 48 (registers the skill file that was previously on disk but unlisted).
